title: Replace placeholder QR code with uploaded payment QR image

requirements.summary: Replace the placeholder payment QR code with the actual user-uploaded QR image
acceptanceCriteria: The file frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png is the actual uploaded QR code image provided by the user.
The existing PaymentSection.tsx continues to reference the same path (frontend/public/assets/generated/google-pay-qr.png) without any code changes required.
The QR code rendered in the payment flow displays the actual uploaded image, not a placeholder.

file_operations.description: Save the user-uploaded payment QR code image (GooglePay_QR.png from workspace) as the static asset at this path, replacing any existing placeholder. This file will be automatically referenced by PaymentSection.tsx without requiring code changes. The image should be the actual QR code provided by the user for Google Pay/UPI transactions.
